summary: Iteration 16 (Portfolio + Navigation + Integrations + Sports SEO + Aprons/Bottoms + Industries refresh + logo swap) fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16.py. (a) /api/industries returns exactly 10 canonical slugs (healthcare, construction-trades, retail, security, corporate, sports-fitness, industrial, beauty-wellness, cleaning, hospitality-catering); aliases (trades, beauty, hospitality, construction, logistics, fitness, hair-beauty) do NOT leak into the list. /api/industries/construction-trades returns 5 products including workwear-tshirt/workwear-jacket/hi-vis-vest/workwear-trousers; legacy /api/industries/trades resolves to the same canonical product set. (b) /api/sports-teams returns 8 slugs (football, rugby, gyms, personal-trainers, boxing-gyms, thai-boxing, kick-boxing, dance-studios); /api/sports-teams/football returns h1='Custom Football Kits, Printed in the UK', intro, seo_paragraph, exactly 3 FAQs, and exactly 8 products. (c) /api/shop/types includes aprons + bottoms with positive product_count; /api/shop/type/aprons returns bib-apron, waist-apron, denim-apron; /api/shop/type/bottoms returns joggers, workwear-trousers, performance-leggings sorted ascending by price. (d) /api/navigation returns DEFAULT_NAV_CONFIG with menu (list-of-dicts) containing keys shop/teams/industries/portfolio/design/contact. PATCH /api/admin/navigation with body {config:{menu:[...]}} persists changes and increments version; GET /api/navigation reflects the new column 'TEST_COL'; POST /api/admin/navigation/reset restores defaults. (e) Portfolio CRUD: POST /api/admin/portfolio with a 1x1 PNG data URL returns image_url ending in '/api/portfolio/file/{id}.png' + populated storage_meta; GET /api/portfolio lists it; GET /api/portfolio/file/{filename} serves bytes with content-type image/png; PATCH updates title; DELETE soft-deletes and the item disappears from public /api/portfolio. category='nonsense' returns 400. featured_only=true filter returns only featured items. (f) /api/admin/integrations returns all 7 expected keys (stripe_api_key, resend_api_key, removebg_api_key, cutoutpro_api_key, judgeme_shop_token, whatsapp_number, contact_email); stripe_api_key shows is_set=true with source='env'. PATCH with {values:{whatsapp_number:'+447700111222'}} persists; public /api/site/whatsapp returns the same number; clearing back works. (g) Regression: /api/auth/login, /api/products, /api/products/personalised-tee, /api/workforce/products, /api/specials/products, /api/leavers/templates all still 200; PATCH /api/admin/products/personalised-tee/meta without token still returns 401. Frontend (Playwright vs live preview URL): homepage navbar shows /logo.png + Sports/Workwear/Portfolio/Design labels; footer shows /logo.png. /portfolio renders portfolio-page with empty state + 'request a sample mock-up' CTA. /sports-teams/football renders H1 'Custom Football Kits, Printed in the UK', 8 product cards in sports-team-products grid, 3 FAQ items, and exactly 1 JSON-LD <script type='application/ld+json'> injected (FAQPage schema). /shop/aprons and /shop/bottoms both render 3 product links each. Admin flow: login with admin@yourownprint.co.uk succeeds and redirects to /admin/product-settings. /admin/portfolio shows admin-portfolio-create + admin-portfolio-upload + admin-portfolio-save (list is empty initially — expected). /admin/navigation shows admin-nav-save + admin-nav-reset + admin-nav-add. /admin/integrations shows all 7 integration rows (stripe/resend/remove/cutout/judge/whatsapp/contact) + admin-integrations-save. WhatsApp FAB correctly hides when /api/site/whatsapp.number is empty AND appears at the bottom-right once whatsapp_number is set via PATCH /api/admin/integrations (verified by setting +447700333444, reloading, observing whatsapp-fab, then clearing).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3473 lines — well past the 700-line review threshold and getting harder to maintain. Strong recommendation to split into routers (routers/industries.py, routers/sports_teams.py, routers/portfolio.py, routers/navigation.py, routers/integrations.py, routers/admin_products.py) and services (services/storage.py for the EMERGENT object storage fallback, services/seed.py for catalogue seeding). Today everything from product catalogues, Stripe webhooks, JWT auth, portfolio storage, navigation config and integrations all live in one file.

PATCH /api/admin/navigation requires the body shape {config:{menu:[...]}} but the error 'config.menu must be a list' isn't surfaced via a Pydantic model — it's a manual dict check at runtime. Promote NavigationConfig + NavigationMenuItem + NavigationColumn + NavigationLink to Pydantic BaseModels so the API surfaces 422 with a structured schema instead of a 400 with a string detail. Same applies to PATCH /api/admin/integrations ({values:{...}}).

Portfolio image storage falls back to inline base64 in Mongo when EMERGENT object storage init fails — confirm there's a payload-size guard (1x1 PNG is fine, but a real-world 5MB product photo base64-inlined into a Mongo document could exceed BSON limits). Recommend rejecting >4MB data URLs at the API boundary if the fallback is active.

The seed admin password is plain-text in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (RDAzhFOX_ZyNSgcldy-gDA) and used to bootstrap the bcrypt hash on startup. Document is fine for dev, but ensure this path is gated by an env flag (e.g. SEED_ADMIN=true) and not run in production deploys, otherwise the admin password is essentially baked into the repo state.

CORS still configured with allow_credentials=True + allow_origins=['*'] in backend/.env (CORS_ORIGINS="*"). Browsers reject credentialed requests in that combination — fine because the frontend uses Bearer tokens, but cookies-based auth (which is also set on /auth/login) silently won't work cross-origin. Pin explicit origins for prod.

No rate-limiting on POST /auth/login or POST /api/admin/portfolio. The portfolio upload accepts arbitrary data URLs from authenticated admins — fine — but an unbounded request body could be abused. Add a per-IP rate limit (slowapi) and/or a max body size limit (FastAPI middleware) for upload endpoints.

GET /api/site/whatsapp returns {'number':''} when unset — frontend WhatsAppFAB hides correctly. However the public /api/portfolio listing includes 'storage_meta' field which can leak implementation details (bucket, content_hash, file size) about the storage backend. Consider stripping storage_meta from the public listing and only exposing it via the admin endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Test session creates one portfolio item titled 'TEST_Portfolio_Item' (category=workwear, featured=true), PATCHes its title to 'TEST_Portfolio_Updated', then soft-deletes it via DELETE /api/admin/portfolio/{id}. Navigation: PATCHes /api/admin/navigation with a TEST_COL column added to 'shop', then immediately calls /api/admin/navigation/reset to restore DEFAULT_NAV_CONFIG. Integrations: PATCHes whatsapp_number to '+447700111222' then clears it back to ''. Frontend: PATCHes whatsapp_number to '+447700333444' via fetch with the bearer token from localStorage, then clears it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 green across all features. KEY GOTCHAS for the next agent: (1) PATCH /api/admin/navigation expects {config:{menu:[...]}} body, NOT {menu:[...]} — wrap in 'config'. (2) The nav 'menu' is a LIST of dicts each with a 'key' field, NOT a dict-keyed-by-section. Look for entries via [m for m in menu if m.get('key')=='shop']. (3) Product catalogues use 'id' as the primary slug (e.g. 'workwear-tshirt'), not 'slug'. /api/industries/{slug} returns {products:[{id, name, price, image, category, ...}]}. (4) The shared requests.Session() picks up the access_token httpOnly cookie after /api/auth/login — to test unauthenticated 401 behaviour, use a FRESH requests.Session(). (5) WhatsApp FAB testid is 'whatsapp-fab' on the floating button. It's hidden via display:none when number is empty (component returns null). (6) Sports-team detail injects exactly 1 <script type='application/ld+json'> into <head> with a FAQPage schema — verified. (7) Admin route uses localStorage key 'yop_admin_token' as Bearer. (8) /admin/portfolio testids: admin-portfolio, admin-portfolio-create, admin-portfolio-upload, admin-portfolio-save, admin-portfolio-list (only rendered when items exist). /admin/navigation: admin-navigation, admin-nav-save, admin-nav-reset, admin-nav-add. /admin/integrations: admin-integrations, admin-integrations-save. Portfolio: portfolio-page, portfolio-empty, portfolio-grid, portfolio-cta-quote, portfolio-filter, portfolio-lightbox, portfolio-lightbox-close. Sports team detail: sports-team-products, sports-team-faqs, sports-team-back, sports-team-cta-configure, sports-team-cta-quote. (9) Aprons + Bottoms inherit default size guides — no overrides exist, which is acceptable per the brief. (10) Stripe key is env-backed (source='env', is_set=true) — masked in UI but not editable inline.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues this iteration. Initial test failures were all due to schema mismatches in my test assertions (used 'slug' instead of 'id' for product catalogues, treated nav 'menu' as a dict instead of a list, used {menu:...} body instead of {config:{menu:...}}, and shared session was authenticated by the login cookie when testing 'no-token' regression). All fixed in the test script — actual application behaviour is correct.
